name: Jalapeno Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Shredded Monterey Jack cheese and/or cheddar cheese
Sliced avocado and sour cream for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Lightly butter an 11x7 inch glass baking pan.
2. Arrange the chilies on the bottom of the casserole dish. Top with an even layer of cheese, then the sliced tomatoes.
3. In a large bowl, whisk the eggs until frothy. Gradually whisk in the evaporated milk, flour, and salt. Carefully pour over the layers in the dish.
4. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until lightly browned. Serve in squares and garnish with sour cream and avocado slices.
